token: MELBOURNE LOGISTICS OPERATIONS GUIDE COMPANY: Linfox Australia REGION: Victoria DEPOT LOCATIONS:
- Laverton North DC: Primary distribution hub, operates 24/7 - Somerton DC: Cold chain and temperature sensitive freight - Dandenong South: Last mile delivery hub for SE suburbs DELIVERY ZONES:
- Zone 1 (CBD): Same day delivery cutoff 11am - Zone 2 (Inner suburbs): Next day delivery - Zone 3 (Outer suburbs): 2-3 business days - Zone 4 (Regional VIC): 3-5 business days
FREIGHT TYPES: - Ambient: Standard palletised freight - Cold chain: 2-8 degrees celsius - Frozen: Below -18 degrees celsius
- Dangerous goods: ADG code compliant vehicles only COMMON DELAY REASONS: - Traffic: Monash Freeway and Westgate Bridge peak hours - Weather: Flooding in Laverton and Derrimut corridors
- Capacity: Peak periods October-December - Customs: International freight clearance at Tullamarine DRIVER SHIFT TIMES: - Early shift: 4am - 12pm
- Day shift: 8am - 4pm - Afternoon shift: 2pm - 10pm - Night shift: 10pm - 6am ESCALATION PROCESS:

- Level 1: Driver contacts depot supervisor - Level 2: Depot supervisor contacts operations manager - Level 3: Operations manager contacts state manager - Level 4: State manager contacts national operations

LOADING ZONES: - Zone 1 (Port Melbourne): Container handling and maritime freight, 24/7 operations - Zone 2 (Altona): Chemical and hazardous materials loading, ADG certified staff required - Zone 3 (Sunshine): General freight loading dock, capacity 20 pallets per bay

- Zone 4 (Campbellfield): Automotive parts and manufacturing components loading - Zone 5 (Epping): Fresh produce and perishables loading, temperature controlled bays - Zone 6 (Dandenong): Retail distribution loading, peak hours 6am-10am - Zone 7 (Laverton): Heavy machinery and oversized freight, crane facilities available
